state.output:
<file>
00001| import { Network } from '../../../lib/alchemy/config';
00002| 
00003| // ===== TYPE DEFINITIONS FROM ALCHEMY SDK =====
00004| // These types are extracted from the alchemy-sdk package for easier reference by AI assistants
00005| 
00006| // Request types for token prices
00007| export interface TokenAddressRequest {
00008|   /** The network to get prices for. */
00009|   network: Network;
00010|   /** The contract address to get prices for. */
00011|   address: string;
00012| }
00013| 
00014| // Token price information
00015| export interface TokenPrice {
00016|   /** The currency the price is denominated in (e.g. 'usd'). */
00017|   currency: string;
00018|   /** The price value as a string to preserve precision. */
00019|   value: string;
00020|   /** ISO timestamp of when the price was last updated. */
00021|   lastUpdatedAt: string;
00022| }
00023| 
00024| // Token price error information
00025| export interface TokenPriceError {
00026|   /** The error message describing why the request failed. */
00027|   message: string;
00028| }
00029| 
00030| // Result for token price by address
00031| export interface TokenPriceByAddressResult {
00032|   /** The network the token is on. */
00033|   network: Network;
00034|   /** The token's contract address. */
00035|   address: string;
00036|   /** Array of price data for the token. Empty if there was an error. */
00037|   prices: TokenPrice[];
00038|   /** Error information if the request failed, null otherwise. */
00039|   error: TokenPriceError | null;
00040| }
00041| 
00042| // Result for token price by symbol
00043| export interface TokenPriceBySymbolResult {
00044|   /** The token symbol that was queried. */
00045|   symbol: string;
00046|   /** Array of price data for the token. Empty if there was an error. */
00047|   prices: TokenPrice[];
00048|   /** Error information if the request failed, null otherwise. */
00049|   error: TokenPriceError | null;
00050| }
00051| 
00052| // Response types for token prices
00053| export interface GetTokenPriceByAddressResponse {
00054|   /** The token price data for each requested address. */
00055|   data: TokenPriceByAddressResult[];
00056| }
00057| 
00058| export interface GetTokenPriceBySymbolResponse {
00059|   /** The token price data for each requested symbol. */
00060|   data: TokenPriceBySymbolResult[];
00061| }
00062| 
00063| // Historical price data point
00064| export interface HistoricalPriceDataPoint {
00065|   /** Price value as a string to preserve precision */
00066|   value: string;
00067|   /** ISO timestamp for the price data point */
00068|   timestamp: string;
00069| }
00070| 
00071| // Historical price intervals
00072| export enum HistoricalPriceInterval {
00073|   /** 5-minute intervals */
00074|   FIVE_MINUTE = "5m",
00075|   /** 1-hour intervals */
00076|   ONE_HOUR = "1h",
00077|   /** 1-day intervals */
00078|   ONE_DAY = "1d"
00079| }
00080| 
00081| // Historical price responses
00082| export interface HistoricalPriceBySymbolResponse {
00083|   /** Token symbol that was queried */
00084|   symbol: string;
00085|   /** Currency the prices are denominated in */
00086|   currency: string;
00087|   /** Array of historical price data points */
00088|   data: HistoricalPriceDataPoint[];
00089| }
00090| 
00091| export interface HistoricalPriceByAddressResponse {
00092|   /** Network that was queried */
00093|   network: Network;
00094|   /** Contract address that was queried */
00095|   address: string;
00096|   /** Currency the prices are denominated in */
00097|   currency: string;
00098|   /** Array of historical price data points */
00099|   data: HistoricalPriceDataPoint[];
00100| }
</file>
